old_value: {"id":"smallhold-5fut","title":"Link preview cards: fetch OG metadata, cache, serve via Mastodon card API","description":"When a post contains a URL, fetch the page's OpenGraph/Twitter Card metadata (title, description, image, site_name, type). Cache in a link_cards table. Serve via the 'card' field in Status JSON (currently null). Requirements: (1) async fetch after post creation (don't block the POST), (2) respect robots.txt, (3) timeout 10s, (4) max 1MB response, (5) cache for 24h, (6) SSRF protection on fetch URL, (7) handle og:image — fetch and store as media, (8) card types: link, photo, video, rich. Make it NOT suck: actually render images, show real titles, don't return stale/broken data.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-19T00:38:43.254708042Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-19T00:38:43.254708042Z"}
